text:
First, note that in 1248, time zones as we know them did not exist, but for the purpose of this exercise, we apply modern time zone rules.  
US/Pacific is UTC-8 (or PDT UTC-7 in summer), but 1248 predates DST, so treat as standard time UTC-8.  
Asia/Shanghai is UTC+8.  

Time difference: UTC+8 − (UTC-8) = 16 hours ahead.  

7:00 AM August 25 (Pacific) + 16 hours = 23:00 same day (August 25).  

FINAL_ANSWER: 23:00 August 25, 1248
